title: K3 Triggers a Surge in Traffic: Moonlight Face Responds to Resource Shortage, Prioritizing Paid Users
excerpt: Moonshot AI recently revealed that user demand for its new model Kimi3 has far exceeded expectations, leading to a tight supply of computing resources across th
content_html:
Moonshot AI recently revealed that user demand for its new model Kimi3 has far exceeded expectations, leading to a tight supply of computing resources across the platform. The company has temporarily not opened registration for new users and is prioritizing the experience of paying existing users.

Huang Zhenxin, the person in charge of Moonshot AI's B-end enterprise business, stated that the team had made adequate preparations before the release of Kimi3. However, actual user growth and call demand still exceeded expectations, resulting in current resource supply pressure. The company has clearly stated that it will not sacrifice the current user experience to achieve short-term user scale growth, but rather ensure that paying users can use the service stably.

To address the current resource bottleneck, Moonshot AI is alleviating the situation through two aspects: optimizing model efficiency and supplementing computing resources, including improving model operation efficiency and increasing computing resource reserves. The time for restoring new user registration will be further assessed based on overall resource conditions and announced later.

In recent years, with the rapid application of large models, competition for AI companies has not only been about model capabilities, but also a comprehensive competition involving computing power supply, infrastructure construction, and service stability. The phenomenon of resource shortages after the launch of popular models reflects that the computing power demand behind high-performance AI services is continuously growing.

Industry experts believe that achieving a balance between model capability improvement, user scale expansion, and computing cost control will become an important challenge for large model companies during the commercialization phase. Moonshot AI's adjustment of K3 resource scheduling also reflects that AI companies are shifting from rapidly acquiring users to placing greater emphasis on long-term service capability development.

sentences.en: Moonshot AI recently revealed that user demand for its new model Kimi3 has far exceeded expectations, leading to a tight supply of computing resources across the platform.
sentences.zh: Moonshot AI近日透露，用户对其新机型Kimi3的需求远超预期，导致全平台计算资源供应紧张。

sentences.en: The company has temporarily not opened registration for new users and is prioritizing the experience of paying existing users.
sentences.zh: 公司暂时不开放新用户注册，优先考虑现有用户的付费体验。

blocks.html_en: Huang Zhenxin, the person in charge of Moonshot AI's B-end enterprise business, stated that the team had made adequate preparations before the release of Kimi3. However, actual user growth and call demand still exceeded expectations, resulting in current resource supply pressure. The company has clearly stated that it will not sacrifice the current user experience to achieve short-term user scale growth, but rather ensure that paying users can use the service stably.

sentences.en: Huang Zhenxin, the person in charge of Moonshot AI's B-end enterprise business, stated that the team had made adequate preparations before the release of Kimi3.
sentences.zh: Moonshot AI B端企业业务负责人黄振新表示，在Kimi3发布之前，团队已经做了充分的准备。

sentences.en: However, actual user growth and call demand still exceeded expectations, resulting in current resource supply pressure.
sentences.zh: 但实际用户增长和通话需求仍超出预期，造成当前资源供给压力。

sentences.en: The company has clearly stated that it will not sacrifice the current user experience to achieve short-term user scale growth, but rather ensure that paying users can use the service stably.
sentences.zh: 公司明确表示，不会牺牲当前的用户体验来实现短期用户规模增长，而是保证付费用户能够稳定使用服务。

blocks.html_en: To address the current resource bottleneck, Moonshot AI is alleviating the situation through two aspects: optimizing model efficiency and supplementing computing resources, including improving model operation efficiency and increasing computing resource reserves. The time for restoring new user registration will be further assessed based on overall resource conditions and announced later.

sentences.en: To address the current resource bottleneck, Moonshot AI is alleviating the situation through two aspects: optimizing model efficiency and supplementing computing resources, including improving model operation efficiency and increasing computing resource reserves.
sentences.zh: 针对目前的资源瓶颈，Moonshot AI正在通过优化模型效率和补充计算资源两个方面来缓解这一情况，包括提高模型运行效率和增加计算资源储备。

sentences.en: The time for restoring new user registration will be further assessed based on overall resource conditions and announced later.
sentences.zh: 恢复新用户注册的时间将根据整体资源情况进一步评估并稍后公布。

blocks.html_en: In recent years, with the rapid application of large models, competition for AI companies has not only been about model capabilities, but also a comprehensive competition involving computing power supply, infrastructure construction, and service stability. The phenomenon of resource shortages after the launch of popular models reflects that the computing power demand behind high-performance AI services is continuously growing.

sentences.en: In recent years, with the rapid application of large models, competition for AI companies has not only been about model capabilities, but also a comprehensive competition involving computing power supply, infrastructure construction, and service stability.
sentences.zh: 近年来，随着大型模型的快速应用，人工智能企业的竞争已不再是模型能力的竞争，而是涉及算力供给、基础设施建设、服务稳定性等方面的综合竞争。

sentences.en: The phenomenon of resource shortages after the launch of popular models reflects that the computing power demand behind high-performance AI services is continuously growing.
sentences.zh: 热门机型推出后资源紧缺的现象，反映出高性能AI服务背后的算力需求不断增长。

blocks.html_en: Industry experts believe that achieving a balance between model capability improvement, user scale expansion, and computing cost control will become an important challenge for large model companies during the commercialization phase. Moonshot AI's adjustment of K3 resource scheduling also reflects that AI companies are shifting from rapidly acquiring users to placing greater emphasis on long-term service capability development.

sentences.en: Industry experts believe that achieving a balance between model capability improvement, user scale expansion, and computing cost control will become an important challenge for large model companies during the commercialization phase.
sentences.zh: 业内专家认为，在模型能力提升、用户规模扩张和计算成本控制之间取得平衡，将成为大型模型公司商业化阶段的重要挑战。

sentences.en: Moonshot AI's adjustment of K3 resource scheduling also reflects that AI companies are shifting from rapidly acquiring users to placing greater emphasis on long-term service capability development.
sentences.zh: Moonshot AI对K3资源调度的调整也反映出AI企业正在从快速获取用户转向更加注重长期服务能力发展。

content_html_zh:
Moonshot AI近日透露，用户对其新机型Kimi3的需求远超预期，导致全平台计算资源供应紧张。 公司暂时不开放新用户注册，优先考虑现有用户的付费体验。

Moonshot AI B端企业业务负责人黄振新表示，在Kimi3发布之前，团队已经做了充分的准备。 但实际用户增长和通话需求仍超出预期，造成当前资源供给压力。 公司明确表示，不会牺牲当前的用户体验来实现短期用户规模增长，而是保证付费用户能够稳定使用服务。

针对目前的资源瓶颈，Moonshot AI正在通过优化模型效率和补充计算资源两个方面来缓解这一情况，包括提高模型运行效率和增加计算资源储备。 恢复新用户注册的时间将根据整体资源情况进一步评估并稍后公布。

近年来，随着大型模型的快速应用，人工智能企业的竞争已不再是模型能力的竞争，而是涉及算力供给、基础设施建设、服务稳定性等方面的综合竞争。 热门机型推出后资源紧缺的现象，反映出高性能AI服务背后的算力需求不断增长。

业内专家认为，在模型能力提升、用户规模扩张和计算成本控制之间取得平衡，将成为大型模型公司商业化阶段的重要挑战。 Moonshot AI对K3资源调度的调整也反映出AI企业正在从快速获取用户转向更加注重长期服务能力发展。
